On April 8, 2026 (April 7 in US time), President Trump announced via Truth Social a two-week ceasefire with Iran, mediated by Pakistan, confirming Iran's agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz immediately as part of a Pakistani-brokered deal[1][4][5]. signals.headline: THUNDER SECURE #1 SEED | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
THUNDER SECURE #1 SEED | YES | HIGH confidence**
The Oklahoma City Thunder have clinched the #1 seed in the Western Conference with the best record in the NBA.[1][3] Multiple key players (Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Jalen Williams, and Isaiah Hartenstein) are being rested for today's regular-season finale against the Suns, indicating the seeding is already locked.[3]

signals.raw:
DEFENDING CHAMPIONS REPEAT CONTENDERS | YES | HIGH confidence**
